# Experience Zeno

> Singapore's multi-merchant loyalty wallet. Top up at any partner merchant, get instant bonus credit and EXP points. Free to join and use.

## What is Experience Zeno?
Experience Zeno is a multi-merchant loyalty wallet for Singapore. Customers top up at any partner merchant and receive instant bonus credit plus EXP points that accumulate across a tiered loyalty system (Explorer, Voyager, Zenith). One app covers all participating merchants.

## Key Features (Customers)
- Instant bonus credit on every topup (rate set by each merchant)
- EXP points earned on every topup and referral
- Three loyalty tiers with increasing benefits
- Referral programme with ongoing EXP rewards
- PIN/biometric wallet security with one-tap freeze
- No fees, no subscription

## Key Features (Merchants)
- Free merchant CRM dashboard
- Customisable bonus credit rates
- Push notification campaigns
- Reservation system with deposit escrow
- Real-time analytics and reporting
- No monthly subscription fee
